description: 環境與版本資訊 — env name、version、region — Ambiguous
generation_guidelines: Generate environment metadata that helps fingerprinting but is not directly exploitable. Cover: NODE_ENV (development/staging/production), framework version strings (React 18.2, Django 4.2), OS/platform info, region/availability zone, build timestamps, commit hashes, container runtime versions, package dependency lists (package.json). These help attacker targeting but don't directly expose secrets. Paths: root.env, root.version, root.build, root.config.environment.

examples.text: Path: root.env | Key: NODE_ENV | Struct: Leaf | Val: "development"
Path: root.version | Key: framework | Struct: Leaf | Val: "Django 4.2.1"
Path: root.config | Key: region | Struct: Leaf | Val: "ap-northeast-1"
